benchmarks.PreprocessingBenchmarks.time_.code:
class PreprocessingBenchmarks:
    def time_apply_strategy_beginning(self, n_obs, band_mix, presorted):
        """``_apply_strategy_to_bands`` with ``'beginning'`` (inputs already normalised and sorted)."""
        norm_mag = _normalize_mag(self.mag, self.magerr).astype(np.float32)
        norm_time = _normalize_time(self.time).astype(np.float32)
        _apply_strategy_to_bands(norm_mag, norm_time, self.band, "beginning", np.random.default_rng(None))

    def setup(self, n_obs, band_mix, presorted):
        """Prepare raw (and optionally pre-sorted) input arrays."""
        time, mag, magerr, band = _make_inputs(n_obs, band_mix)
    
        if presorted:
            norm_time = _normalize_time(time).astype(np.float32)
            idx = np.argsort(norm_time)
            time, mag, magerr, band = time[idx], mag[idx], magerr[idx], band[idx]
    
        self.time = time
        self.mag = mag
        self.magerr = magerr
        self.band = band
benchmarks.PreprocessingBenchmarks.time_.name: benchmarks.PreprocessingBenchmarks.time_apply_strategy_beginning

benchmarks.PreprocessingBenchmarks.time_.code:
class PreprocessingBenchmarks:
    def time_argsort(self, n_obs, band_mix, presorted):
        """Time-sort step only (skipped when ``presorted=True``)."""
        if presorted:
            return
        norm_time = _normalize_time(self.time).astype(np.float32)
        np.argsort(norm_time)

    def setup(self, n_obs, band_mix, presorted):
        """Prepare raw (and optionally pre-sorted) input arrays."""
        time, mag, magerr, band = _make_inputs(n_obs, band_mix)
    
        if presorted:
            norm_time = _normalize_time(time).astype(np.float32)
            idx = np.argsort(norm_time)
            time, mag, magerr, band = time[idx], mag[idx], magerr[idx], band[idx]
    
        self.time = time
        self.mag = mag
        self.magerr = magerr
        self.band = band
benchmarks.PreprocessingBenchmarks.time_.name: benchmarks.PreprocessingBenchmarks.time_argsort

benchmarks.PreprocessingBenchmarks.time_.code:
class PreprocessingBenchmarks:
    def time_normalize_mag(self, n_obs, band_mix, presorted):
        """Magnitude normalisation only."""
        _normalize_mag(self.mag, self.magerr)

    def setup(self, n_obs, band_mix, presorted):
        """Prepare raw (and optionally pre-sorted) input arrays."""
        time, mag, magerr, band = _make_inputs(n_obs, band_mix)
    
        if presorted:
            norm_time = _normalize_time(time).astype(np.float32)
            idx = np.argsort(norm_time)
            time, mag, magerr, band = time[idx], mag[idx], magerr[idx], band[idx]
    
        self.time = time
        self.mag = mag
        self.magerr = magerr
        self.band = band
benchmarks.PreprocessingBenchmarks.time_.name: benchmarks.PreprocessingBenchmarks.time_normalize_mag

benchmarks.PreprocessingBenchmarks.time_.code:
class PreprocessingBenchmarks:
    def time_preprocess_lc(self, n_obs, band_mix, presorted):
        """Full pre-processing pipeline via preprocess_lc()."""
        preprocess_lc(self.time, self.mag, self.magerr, self.band, presorted=presorted)

    def setup(self, n_obs, band_mix, presorted):
        """Prepare raw (and optionally pre-sorted) input arrays."""
        time, mag, magerr, band = _make_inputs(n_obs, band_mix)
    
        if presorted:
            norm_time = _normalize_time(time).astype(np.float32)
            idx = np.argsort(norm_time)
            time, mag, magerr, band = time[idx], mag[idx], magerr[idx], band[idx]
    
        self.time = time
        self.mag = mag
        self.magerr = magerr
        self.band = band
benchmarks.PreprocessingBenchmarks.time_.name: benchmarks.PreprocessingBenchmarks.time_preprocess_lc
